html:
2026-0554
2026-06-04FINFinancial Administration ActRemission Order in Respect of the 2016-2017 and 2019 Bovine Tuberculosis OutbreaksRemission Order in Respect of the 2016-2017 and 2019 Bovine Tuberculosis Outbreaks in order to allow taxpayers to extend the period during which they can defer the inclusion in their income of the amount of compensation they received under the Health of Animals Act as a result of the forced destruction of their livestock.N/A
subject: Remission Order in Respect of the 2016-2017 and 2019 Bovine Tuberculosis Outbreaks
precis: Remission Order in Respect of the 2016-2017 and 2019 Bovine Tuberculosis Outbreaks in order to allow taxpayers to extend the period during which they can defer the inclusion in their income of the amount of compensation they received under the Health of Animals Act as a result of the forced destruction of their livestock.
